Open to sponsorships, partnerships & opportunities · St. Petersburg, FL

Mike "King Killer" Heckert

Michael "King Killer" Heckert — professional bare-knuckle fighter for BKFC (2–1, both wins by KO), founder of two ecommerce brands, and a self-taught builder with 40 public repos. Everything below is built for sponsors, partners, and people who want to work with a finisher.

01 — The Fighter

Mike "King Killer" Heckert — BKFC Middleweight

Professional bare-knuckle boxer for the Bare Knuckle Fighting Championship. 6'0" middleweight who uses reach and speed to overwhelm opponents — both pro wins came by knockout.

2–1

0
Knockouts

Middleweight

W · KO

vs. Justin Walters — BKFC Fight Night Clearwater

OCC Roadhouse, Clearwater, FL · April 2026. First-round KO in front of the hometown Tampa Bay crowd.

W · KO

vs. Scott Lampert — BKFC 53

Orlando, FL · November 2023. Pro bare-knuckle debut — outclassed a heavy-handed power puncher.

L

Official BKFC record, clearly presented

Full bout history, opponent detail, and current media kit are available in the sponsor deck and on request.

Beat the Bell — test your fight reflexes

A pro fighter reacts in ~200ms. Think you'd survive in there?
YOUR BEST: — PRO BENCHMARK: ~200ms Three rounds. No gloves. Good luck.

02 — The Brands

Founder, owner, operator

Two ecommerce brands I built and run end to end on Shopify — product, design, marketing, fulfillment, and the storefronts themselves.

King Killers
Combat sports apparel · Fighter owned & operated

Premium activewear, gym clothes, and fightwear — from MMA rashguards and fight tees to supplements and boxing-glove jewelry. Built for people who train, by someone who actually fights.

04 — Brand Deal Room

The sponsorship case, built for a brand manager

A partnership with Mike is not just a logo on fight shorts. It is a fighter, founder, and content operator who can turn a fight cycle into measurable creative your team can reuse, report on, and defend internally.

Why this is a cleaner buy

Most athlete sponsorships stop at visibility. This one packages fight-night exposure, creator-style content, and ecommerce fluency into one partner. Mike knows how products sell because he runs the storefronts himself.

27K+Instagram audience 2-1BKFC record 84+store reviews

Best-fit sponsor categories

Strongest fit is performance, grit, recovery, discipline, and local pride. The brand should want raw credibility more than polished celebrity.

Supplements Energy drinks Recovery tech Fitness equipment Men's grooming Streetwear Meal prep Tampa Bay brands
DELIVERABLE 01Fight-week visibilityLogo placement, tagged fight-week content, weigh-in coverage, walkout/corner assets, and highlight reuse.
DELIVERABLE 02Creator contentDedicated reels, story sequences, product integration, training clips, promo codes, and brand mentions.
DELIVERABLE 03Usage rightsYour team can repost, cut down, and use agreed content across owned channels, sales pages, and paid media add-ons.
DELIVERABLE 04Performance recapEvery campaign ends with reach, engagement, clicks, code redemptions, and content links packaged for internal reporting.

Audience snapshot brands can act on

Combat sports fansBKFC, boxing, MMA, training, striking, fight-week personalities, and knockout highlights.
Fitness buyersPeople who respond to practical training, gym gear, supplements, recovery, apparel, and discipline-based messaging.
Founder-led credibilityMike can speak to products as an operator, not just an endorser reading a script.

Procurement-ready promises

ComplianceFTC disclosure, paid partnership labels, category exclusivity options, and pre-post content review.
Speed48-hour response target, campaign calendar before launch, and clear approval windows.
MeasurementUTM links, promo codes, platform screenshots, and a post-campaign recap built for your team.
FounderRuns two stores
FighterBKFC middleweight
CreatorContent-native
OperatorKnows conversion
Want a brand-safe package? Ask for audience screenshots, deliverable menu, usage rights, and the fight-cycle calendar in the first reply. Request the deal room

Three tools that make the deal easier to approve

Choose a package and the assets your team needs. The planner shows what the campaign can produce without pretending to forecast revenue.

Trackedmeasurement

06 — Partner with me

Sponsorship, productized

No guesswork. Here's how a partnership runs, what each package includes, and the answers your marketing team will ask for — all before the first email.

The fight gets announced

Signing-day style content, press pickup, and the countdown begins — your brand is tagged into the story from day one, not bolted on at the end.

Title Partner
One brand only · Lead placement
  • Prime fight-kit logo — largest placement
  • Walkout shirt + corner banner
  • Post-fight interview mention
  • Monthly dedicated social content
  • Fight-camp series presented by you
  • Appearance day included
Investment: custom, built per fight cycle
Fight Kit Partner
On the kit · In the frame
  • Fight-shorts logo placement
  • Fight-week social features
  • Tagged fight-camp content
  • Highlight-clip logo visibility
  • Usage rights for your channels
Investment: custom, built per fight cycle
Content Partner
Digital-first package
  • Dedicated posts, stories & reels
  • Product integration in technique videos
  • Promo codes & link placements
  • Performance recap after each cycle
Investment: custom, built per campaign

How I work with brands

Do you follow FTC disclosure rules?

Yes — every sponsored post carries clear, compliant disclosure (#ad / paid partnership tools). Your legal team never has to chase me, and your brand never ends up in a screenshot for the wrong reason.

Do we get content approval?

Yes. Sponsored content goes to you for review before it posts. You'll know exactly what's going live, when, and where — with revision rounds built into the agreement.

Can we reuse the content on our own channels?

Usage rights are part of every package — repost, cut, and run the content on your brand channels. Paid-media (whitelisting) rights are available as an add-on.

Do you offer category exclusivity?

Title Partners get full category exclusivity for the fight cycle — if you're my energy drink, no other energy drink touches the kit, the content, or the corner.

How fast do you respond, and how do we measure results?

Replies within 48 hours. Every campaign ends with a recap: reach, engagement, link clicks, and code redemptions, so your team has real numbers to judge the partnership by.

Want the full pitch in one file?The sponsor deck — record, reach, placements, and tiers — as a shareable PDF.
Download the sponsor deck

BKFC career — the climb to a ranked spot

◐ IN PROGRESS
09 — About

Who I am

I'm Michael Heckert — 31, fighting and building out of St. Petersburg, Florida.

I started in Kansas, where I became an amateur MMA champion with Blackout FC before turning pro in bare-knuckle boxing with BKFC. Fighting taught me the operating system I run everything on: show up every day, do the unglamorous work, and perform when the lights are on.

That same system built my businesses. I founded King Killers because I wanted fightwear made by someone who actually gets punched for a living, and OurCoordinates because the best gifts carry a story. I run both end to end — product, storefront, marketing, fulfillment.

When AI coding tools showed up, I treated them like a new training partner. Forty public repos later, I build my own tools and automations instead of waiting on anyone. Whether it's a sponsorship, a partnership, or a role — you're getting someone who finishes what he starts, on the canvas and off it.

KANSASAmateur MMA championWon the Blackout FC title and committed to combat sports.
FLORIDAMoved to the Tampa Bay areaSt. Pete becomes home base for training and business.
FOUNDERLaunched OurCoordinates & King KillersTwo Shopify brands, built and operated solo.
NOV 2023BKFC pro debut — W by KOBeat Scott Lampert at BKFC 53 in Orlando.
APR 2026Hometown W by KOBeat Justin Walters at BKFC Fight Night Clearwater.
NOW2–1, building, shippingChasing the next fight, the next launch, the next repo.
10 — Let’s talk

Sponsor me, partner with me, or hire me

Fight sponsorships, brand partnerships, ecommerce collaborations, or roles where a relentless builder is an asset. I'll send the media kit and sponsor deck with my first reply.
